---
title: "CV / Resume"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="section-title">Curriculum Vitae</div>

You can download my CV using the button below, or view it directly in the embedded viewer.

<a href="CV_ConglinBao.pdf" download class="project-link" style="margin-bottom: 24px; display: inline-block;">
  Download CV (PDF)
</a>

<div class="cv-embed-container">
  <iframe src="CV_ConglinBao.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border:none;">
    Your browser does not support embedded PDFs.
    <a href="CV_ConglinBao.pdf">Download the PDF</a> instead.
  </iframe>
</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  © 2026 Conglin (Franklin) Bao &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  Built with R Markdown &nbsp;·&nbsp;
  <a href="https://github.com/RichardFranklinBAO" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
</div>
